elements.description: WALL TYPE, ขนาด 12,000 BTU.

EXHAUST AIR GRILL W/INS, ขนาด 6"x6", paired 1-to-1 with each of the two 120 CFM ceiling fans

warnings: GRID CONFIRMATION (independent, matches t2's revised read, disagrees with t1): the printed dimension chain on this page (1.30+4.00+3.00+1.30 horizontal under grid 1/2/3; 1.50+4.00+bracket(2.00+3.50)+1.50+1.50 vertical below grid A) is identical to หน้า29/35/36 and matches the building grid master (หน้า00_gridline.json) exactly, including the A'/A'' dummy-grid extension position (unlabeled on this sheet itself, same caveat noted on the other plan pages).
This is the only mechanical sheet in the drawing set (M-01 of 1, per title block 'M-58108'), covering recommended AC/ceiling-fan/exhaust-grille placement for the ground floor.

Independent re-read (t3) confirms t2's/t1's equipment counts and BTU/CFM/size values, all clearly legible at this resolution. Room-to-equipment pairing for the two 40 CFM units and two 120 CFM units is a best-effort reading based on physical proximity on the drawing (not an explicit leader-line-to-room confirmation for every unit) -- confidence raised to 0.7-0.75 vs t2's 0.6 given clearer legibility of the labels themselves, but the precise room boundary for each fan (e.g. whether the 2nd 40 CFM fan serves นอน 1 or the ห้องน้ำ) still carries residual ambiguity.

No cost/BTU-sizing calculation basis (e.g. room area used to size 12,000/9,000 BTU) is shown on this sheet -- it only presents the recommended equipment and location, consistent with it being a mechanical layout plan rather than a load-calculation sheet.
